message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor White
  BorderColor Black
  ArrowColor Black
}

class GameActivity {
    pattern
    userInput
    speed
}

class ScoresActivity {
    highScore
}

class SettingsActivity {
    difficulty
}

class simon
class buttonPress
class getHighScore
class Beginner
class Intermediate
class Advanced

GameActivity --> "1" ScoresActivity : update highest sequence count
GameActivity --> "1" SettingsActivity : view
GameActivity *-- "1" simon : contains
GameActivity *-- "1" buttonPress : contains
ScoresActivity *-- "1" getHighScore : contains
SettingsActivity *-- "1" Beginner : contains
SettingsActivity *-- "1" Intermediate : contains
SettingsActivity *-- "1" Advanced : contains

note top of GameActivity: C
note top of ScoresActivity: C
note top of SettingsActivity: C
note top of simon: C
note top of buttonPress: C
note top of getHighScore: C
note top of Beginner: C
note top of Intermediate: C
note top of Advanced: C

title Simon Domain Model
@enduml
```
